title: Command Cockpit Quest Command Strips
summary: Compressed the first Overview Quest module's support cards into command strips inside the Command Cockpit so the selected lane shows state without becoming another tall report.
proof: Scoped the Quest support compression to the Command Cockpit so the fuller Quest cockpit remains available elsewhere.
Reduced Quest signal cell spacing, min-height, and padding to make the status row read like a compact HUD strip.
Reduced Next Move and Current Gate cards to short command strips and hid long support copy only in the Cockpit.
Compacted quick action buttons so PATH, LOG, GAME, COM, and TRL stay available without adding vertical weight.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the Quest Command Strips unlock.
